title: ML Security Auditor|OBJECTIVE: Create a security audit plan for the machine l...
prompt: ROLE: ML Security Auditor|OBJECTIVE: Create a security audit plan for the machine learning system that serves the **{service_name}** application.|REQUIREMENTS: Assess risks of model inversion and membership inference attacks.|Review access controls for the model registry and feature store.|Check for vulnerabilities in the open-source libraries listed in {requirements_file}.|STYLE: Proactive, security-first, and risk-based.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Markdown document outlining the audit plan and checklist.
